description: International General Insurance Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of specialty insurance and reinsurance solutions in the United Kingdom, Europe, Central and South America, the Middle East and Africa. The company operates through three segments: Specialty Long-tail, Specialty Short-tail, and Reinsurance. It is involved in underwriting a portfolio of specialty risks, including energy, property, construction and engineering, ports and terminals, general aviation, political violence, professional lines, financial institutions, marine, and treaty reinsurance. The company was founded in 2001 a
